headline: Did Vistra’s (VST) Q1 Profit Surge and Completed Buyback Just Recast Its Capital Story?
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Vistra Corp. reported sales of US$5,640 million and net income of US$1,029 million, and by March 31 it had repurchased 2,373,546 shares, completing a total buyback of 168,279,522 shares for US$6.13 billion under its October 12, 2021 program. Together with fresh compensation-related stock grants to multiple directors, these results highlight Vistra’s focus on aligning leadership incentives with shareholder interests while reshaping its capital structure. We’ll...

headline: Donald Trump and Nancy Pelosi Both Recently Bought the Same Underfollowed Stock. It Could Be a Massive AI Winner.
summary: Two of the most-watched political traders in America, on opposite ends of the spectrum, just bought the same stock. Nancy Pelosi disclosed a Vistra (NYSE:VST) stock purchase tied to a January 16 options exercise executed by her husband, Paul Pelosi. Furthermore, recently released financial disclosures indicate that President Donald Trump bought Vistra shares on February ...
